{{Infobox character
| name = Aelora
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aelora]] uses crystal magic.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aelora]] has a white-armored forearm with a sleek, white console.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aelora]] is a member of the [[Titan Knights]] and is described as the [[White Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aelora]]'s magic is used to devise a magical weapon.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
